summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Storybook Vault personalization flow. All backend APIs working correctly with active template. Full personalization flow tested end-to-end including form submission, generation, and admin management. System is fully functional.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API health check (/api/) returns success
✅ Template list API shows active template with field_definitions
✅ Simulate Polar webhook creates personalization session with view_password field
✅ Session lookup by checkout_id returns session data correctly
✅ Session data includes injected view_password system field
✅ Admin templates access shows template with personalization badge
✅ Template spreads endpoint works for admin spread editor
✅ PersonalizationSuccess page polls and redirects to form correctly
✅ PersonalizationForm renders with all fields including password field
✅ Form submission works with confirmation dialog
✅ Admin panel loads with all sections accessible
✅ Template Settings modal shows field definitions correctly
✅ Personalization Orders section shows completed sessions

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and flows working correctly)

✅ Admin panel loads with Templates section
✅ Admin can access Template Settings with Field Definitions
✅ Full personalization flow: form fill → submit → generation → completion
✅ Personalization Orders tracking working in admin panel
